query:
SELECT externalCompetenciaId, competenciaName, progressoTotal, totalAulas, aulasDisponiveis, aulasConcluidas 
FROM student_performance 
WHERE externalUserId = '702806' 
ORDER BY competenciaName;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2kPX7CjhqdMFT8y.9c22f9f54902 --database 5n7arrGNHjNdoFCMzyGXcY --execute SELECT externalCompetenciaId, competenciaName, progressoTotal, totalAulas, aulasDisponiveis, aulasConcluidas

WHERE externalUserId = '702806' 
ORDER BY competenciaName;
